case_title: DANIEL IMANI VS. JOHN H CHEONG et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEONG, JOHN H DBA (DANZHAUS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY IMANI, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHEONG, JOHN H DBA (DANZHAUS) JUNG, ANN L DBA (DANZHAUS) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES (2) BY DEFENDANTS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED NOV-02-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEONG, JOHN H DBA (DANZHAUS)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE -0- SERVED NOV-02-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUNG, ANN L DBA (DANZHAUS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-03-2014 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS DEFECTIVE FOR JOHN CHEONG, THERE WAS NO DATE/TIME OF MAILING ON THE SUBSTITUTE SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVED DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED (506).
